meta.title: Divert: Day 3 (nowaste)
description: Divert: Day 3 (nowaste) replays the Day 3 solar trace used for repeatable divert tuning comparisons.
No-waste settings should be more aggressive, preferring to use available solar even if that risks brief import.
This variant is driven from solar input, so the main comparison is available charge power versus actual EV charge power.
